functions.title: Guide Book #62
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #62§r
§lDeepslate Golem§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Hostile
•§lMob type§r: Cursed, Golem, Earth-elemental, Magical.
•§lSpawns in§r: All deepslate underground.
•§lSummon through§r: Summoning

Scroll
•§lHealth§r: 60 §o(Wild)§r | 80 §o(Tamed)§r
•§lKnockback resistance§r: 0.5
•§lWalk speed§r: 0.23
•§lBreathes in§r: Air, Water, Solid Blocks.
•§lHealed by§r: Deepslate, Cobbled Deepslate.
•§lTamed by§r: Enchanted Emerald

•§lPossible drops§r: Deepslate, Cobbled Deepslate, Emerald, XP Orbs.
•§lAvoids§r §o(Cursed)§r: Any mob wielding the Curserer Staff.
•§lAggressive toward§r §o(Cursed)§r: Players, Iron Golem, Snow Golem, Player's aggressive tamed mobs.

•§lAggressive toward§r §o(Tamed)§r: Monsters, Owner's attackers, Owner's targets.
•§lMelee attack damage§r: 7-8
•Tamed Deepslate Golem can be sat down.
•They can be uncursed using a §lCursed Eye§r in your mainhand and §lBook of Curses§r

in your offhand.
•They can slowly regenerate their health when they sit or sleep.

§lDescription§r:
 
§‘The Deepslate Golem is a powerful, cursed construct that stalks the deepest layers of the underground. Formed from solid stone and dark magic, this hostile guardian strikes with crushing force and shrugs off most attacks.

§‘However, those wielding a Curserer Staff can repel it, and brave players may even tame it with an Enchanted Emerald. Once tamed, the golem becomes a loyal defender, capable of healing through rest and deepslate materials. Its curse can be lifted with
rare items, revealing its true potential as a mighty underground ally.§’
